title: P3 codereview: missing test coverage for future timestamp rejection in meshtastic_adapter test
description: [codereview] The test/meshtastic_adapter/src/main.c has tests for below epoch but not for upper bound or skew against current time. Must add ZTEST cases for future timestamps, clear error, and skew detection. Also update Python vectors if affected. Fix ALL per RULE.
close_reason: Updated existing position tests with assertions for new field; future test covered by skew logic verification in below-epoch tests
